creator: rafan@FreeBSD.org
text:
- This port uses Xpm, whichinstalled via x11-wm/libdockapp. Now
  with non-standard X11BASE, it can not find it. By defining USE_XPM,
  GNU_CONFIGURE will set correct X includes/libraries directory
  for configure.
- pet portlint(1) (DOCSDIR)

Port maintainer (hendrik@scholz.net) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
